summary: Iter 85 audit fixes batch 1 verified. Backend 5/5 pytest passing (login + GET /api/characters/{id} + PATCH with current_hit_points/temporary_hit_points/conditions persists + partial PATCH no 422 + campaign rules_edition regression). Frontend Playwright passes for ALL 6 review items: (1) character-search-input + campaign-search-input both render and 'wiz' filter narrows list to wizard-only entries (TEST_BlockB_Wizard, Test_*_Wiz, LvlUp_Wizard, Test_Wizard_LvlUp — 13 wizard cards, 0 non-wizard); (2) campaign-edition-{id} pill renders text '2024 RULES' on campaign b51ba0e9...; (3) Mode picker renders all 4 cards (kids/premade/basic/full) and Kids Mode IS first (kids x=510 < premade x=782 at same y=174.78) — no orphan 3+1 wrap; (4) AdminPage code review confirms 4 stat boxes unified to bg #0F2440 + border rgba(212,160,23,0.35) + gold icon #D4A017 — no teal/red/green/orange tints; tabs bg rgba(212,160,23,0.10) when active (gold-style). Live load returned 403 on /api/admin/* because lcblakey24 isn't a backend admin in this env, but page shell loaded; visual unification verified in code; (5) CharacterCombatTab on test character a1e7babc-c582-48ec-8a64-8c71501fa281: data-testid='no-weapons-hint' visible and condition-toggle-blinded visible (CONDITIONS section open by default, useState(true) at line 34); (6) GM CombatTab on campaign with 0 players: spontaneous-combat-btn bg=rgba(212,160,23,0.1) border=rgba(212,160,23,0.4) color=#D4A017 (GOLD, NOT red), and quick-combat-btn count=0 (correctly hidden). All previous Iter 84 testids (rules-edition-toggle, condition-toggle-*) still functional (regression OK).

passed: PATCH /api/characters/{id} {current_hit_points, temporary_hit_points, conditions} -> 200, persists on GET
Typing 'wiz' filters character list to Wizards only (Test_*_Wiz, LvlUp_Wizard*, Test_Wizard_LvlUp, TEST_BlockB_Wizard)
/characters/new mode picker: all 4 cards visible, Kids Mode is FIRST (top-left)
AdminPage code review: 4 stat boxes unified bg #0F2440 + gold border + gold icon (Total Users / Active Codes / Referrals / Reviews)
AdminPage tabs use rgba(212,160,23,0.10) gold-active background (no red highlight)
/characters/{id} Combat tab: data-testid='no-weapons-hint' visible (only Unarmed Strike equipped)
Combat tab CONDITIONS section open by default — condition-toggle-blinded visible without click (useState(true))
/gm-screen/{id} Combat tab: spontaneous-combat-btn bg=rgba(212,160,23,0.1) border=gold color=#D4A017 (NOT red)
GM Combat tab: quick-combat-btn HIDDEN (count=0) when 0 players in campaign
Iter 84 regression: rules-edition-toggle, condition-toggle-* testids, sidebar groups intact

critical_code_review_comments: AdminPage 4 stat boxes do NOT have data-testid attributes (e.g. data-testid='admin-stat-users'). Future regression tests would benefit from adding them. Functionally correct but slightly less testable.

AdminPage live data fetch returns 403 for lcblakey24 in this env (frontend whitelists by username substring at UnifiedDashboard line 116, but backend admin check is stricter). Frontend renders the chrome correctly; this is environment-specific, not a bug introduced by Iter 85.
UnifiedDashboard.js is 1376 lines — file size is well over the 700-line threshold. Should be split into Header/PlayerSection/CampaignSection/Modals subcomponents in a future refactor pass.

CharacterCreationModePicker uses 'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr))' with maxWidth: 800 — at typical desktop widths this gives a clean 2x2 (verified: kids and premade share y=174.78, basic and full are on row 2). On a narrow tablet (<480px content), it gracefully falls to 1col. No 3+1 orphan layout observed.

test_iter85_audit_batch1.py defaults BASE_URL to the live preview URL if env not set — kept as fallback because plugin sandbox does not propagate REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL into pytest env. Production runs on supervisor still pick up the env var.
test_credentials: Email: lcblakey24@outlook.com / Password: LCBlakey24?! (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Test character a1e7babc-c582-48ec-8a64-8c71501fa281, campaign b51ba0e9-5b08-44ed-b3dd-4a97dd2a09f6 (rules_edition='2024').
seed_data_creation: PATCH HP test toggled current_hit_points/temporary_hit_points/conditions on Test_Orc_Wiz then RESTORED to original values. No persistent test data left over.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iter 85 batch-1 audit items pass. CombatPage was not deep-tested per agent-to-agent note (don't launch combat); only header/back-button code path was reviewed via the existing CombatPage.js — endCombat HP sync uses PATCH, which the backend test confirms accepts current_hit_points + temporary_hit_points + conditions. AdminPage stat boxes lack data-testid attributes but visual unification is verified in code (lines 262-324). Test character a1e7babc... HP/conditions restored to original after PATCH test.
